steps.t: The best path can be found south-west of Grimnesberg's crest. Cyneberg can be summoned using the whistle should you become separated. You should head …
Another pile of Orcs can be found north-west of the first in the eastern High Knolls. You should investigate the Orcs with Cyneberg.
Another pile of Orcs can be found north of the first in the eastern High Knolls. You should investigate the Orcs with Cyneberg.

Cyneberg kneels at a pile of slain Orcs in the northern High Knolls. You should speak with Cyneberg.
